scripts.ingest: cd packages/ingest && uv run databolsa-ingest run all
scripts.warehouse:build: cd packages/warehouse && uv run dbt build
scripts.warehouse:test: cd packages/warehouse && uv run dbt test
scripts.warehouse:docs: cd packages/warehouse && uv run dbt docs generate && uv run dbt docs serve
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec db psql -U databolsa -d databolsa
scripts.ingest:docker: docker compose run --rm scheduler databolsa-ingest run all
scripts.gen:api: bun run gen:openapi && bun run gen:api-types
